title: Janus Packaged Local Beta Profile Isolation
route: TEST SKILL SECURITY -> custom packaged-local profile isolation runner -> SKILL 7

deploymentModel.identityInterpretation: separate local beta profiles / AppData roots
deploymentModel.futureHostedRequirement: If Janus becomes hosted/SaaS, rerun this spec with real staging accounts and server-side tenant IDs.

compilerStatus.reason: Spec 12 is a cross-profile security gate for Janus' local Electron beta model. A custom runner creates two isolated beta-profile fixtures and validates DB, file, export, tool-gate, session and debug-surface boundaries.

cases.expectedEvidence: Separate A/B AppData, SQLite, upload and artifact roots exist
Profile A cannot resolve Profile B chat/message IDs
Profile A cannot find Profile B memory canary
Profile B upload canary is outside Profile A root and absent from A files
Profile A cannot resolve Profile B project/task canaries
Profile A cannot resolve Profile B generated artifact IDs or file canaries
Profile A export scan contains no Profile B canaries
Cross-user data gate disables tools and skips LLM generation
JWT expiration and profile-local session behavior are explicit
Debug endpoints are denied in packaged beta mode
